task.objective: Convert mechanically verifiable portions of the Proofrail Foundation Gate into deterministic repository checks, generated governance projections, machine-readable harness findings, governance tests, and CI-ready verification without implementing Proofrail product runtime behavior or claiming that conceptual quality can be automated.

requirements: Preserve current canonical domain vocabulary and authoritative Verdict semantics while mechanizing existing Foundation authority.
Validate committed JSON Machine Task Contracts under governance/tasks with Ajv 8.x and document that YAML remains a direction but is not mechanically validated in this phase.
Create a structurally separate HARN_ Foundation engineering harness reason-code registry and require validator findings to use registered HARN_ codes.
Support deterministic human-readable validator output and deterministic JSON output with status VALID or INVALID, not Proofrail product Verdict values.
Validate governance/foundation.config.json against an explicit JSON Schema.
Keep required-document validation, local Markdown link and anchor validation, repository identity hygiene, and Machine Task Contract review constants mechanically enforced.
Mechanize exact-set canonical terminology and canonical Verdict validation from authoritative document structure.

Create generated governance projections for canonical terminology, canonical Verdict values, and the Documentation Authority Index, including source documents and deterministic source-section digests.
Keep generated projections derived from authoritative Markdown and fail governance checks when committed generated artifacts are stale.
Validate Documentation Authority Index duplicates, malformed local authority references, missing local targets, and declared AGENTS.md authority routes.

Add Node built-in node:test governance tests with synthetic data and negative cases for deterministic output, reason-code registry failures, required documents, stale projections, canonical drift, authority index drift, broken links, identity contamination, and Machine Task Contract review constants.
Create the Clean Agent Test protocol and machine-readable specification without claiming that the Builder ran or passed the test.
Create architecture mechanization preparation without implementing package dependency enforcement.
Update Foundation Gate documentation, validation evidence, known debt, AGENTS.md, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CI, and Builder review boundaries honestly.

requiredInvariants: A second governance generation run without source changes produces no repository diff.
governance:check and verify do not modify the repository.
JSON validator output parses as JSON and reports VALID for a valid Foundation repository.
All emitted validator finding codes exist in the HARN_ registry.
No HARN_ code is documented as a Proofrail product runtime reason code.
Generated canonical terminology, canonical Verdict, and Documentation Authority Index projections are current.
Governance tests include negative cases and use synthetic data.
No Proofrail runtime package or product execution path is introduced.

stopConditions: the exact PR #1 review subject changed before integration
the task requires changing canonical domain terminology
the task requires changing authoritative Verdict semantics
the task requires changing Evidence authority classes
the task requires changing Trust semantics
mechanization requires Proofrail product runtime implementation
mechanization requires executing target repository code
the Machine Task Contract cannot remain engineering governance only
Ajv installation cannot be completed and real JSON Schema instance validation cannot be provided without implementing a custom general JSON Schema engine
the authoritative Documentation Authority Index cannot be projected deterministically without redefining its authority in a second source
